Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:13:59 a.m. and concluding at 09:30:58 a.m.

Plaintiff Nooureddine Manser appearing represented by Robert G. Mack, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Denys Shameto not appearing.

NOUREDDINE MANSER is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination and is examined by the Court.

The Court having read through Plaintiff's medical records, having listened to testimony presented, reviewed declaration of Plaintiff, and declaration re: attorney fees, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

The Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Noureddine Manser, and against Defendant Denys Shameto, as follows:

1. Damages: $605,000.00
2. Prejudgment
interest at the
annual rate of 7%: $212,451.00
3. Attorney fees: $261,343.00
4. Costs: $793.00

Total Judgment: $1,079,587.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Continued To Jan-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Default Ccp 473(B); Memoradum In Support
Off Calendar Oct-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Robert G. Mack, Esq. (415.392.8920; rmack@kurlanderburtonlaw.com) of Kurlander, Burton & Mack for Plaintiff.
Daniel Sterrett, Esq. (415.829.4485; Sterrett@sterrettlawfirm.com) for Defendant.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DENYS SHAMETO'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Default CCP 473(B) is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Vicki Haines, CSR# 5995, (415.676.7416; vhainescsr@gmail.com), Reported. =(302/VP)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Continued To Sep-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Mack, Esq. 415-250-7417 for Plaintiff via Zoom.
Denys Shameto, 916-600-4974, Defaulted defendant in Pro Per. (in the courtroom)

This matter comes on calendar this day, for a Prove-up hearing.

Hearing is held. Mr. Mack, requests a continuance since his client Noureddine Manser who was present earlier had an emergency and needed to leave. The Court informs Mr. Shameto, he has not filed an answer, is in Default, therefore he cannot speak before the Court. The Court suggests Mr. Shameto to speak with a lawyer and is informed that if a motion to vacate is filed it will be heard in a different department.

After evidence, the Court informs Mr. Mack she needs more information from his client regarding pain and suffering, declarations re: medical records and any subpoenaed documents. The Court will also need more information and support for attorney's fees, including the retainer agreement and work done by Counsel. Counsel to efile papers and provide courtesy copies 10 days prior to the hearing at the lates. Counsel to email clerk K. Dougherty to indicate documents have been dropped off in Dept. 514.

Prove-up Hearing is continued to September 22, 2022 at 9:00am. Both sides are present and are aware of the new hearing date.

Judge: Murlene J. Randle, Clerk: M. Goodman, Reporter: FTR. (514/MJR)
